text: Persist watchdog connection and animator state across frontend reloads
description: If a watchdog session was connected and the animator/watchdog was enabled, a frontend hot reload or full page reload should reconnect to the running session automatically, restore terminal buffers, and show the correct enabled/emergency state without stopping the background animator loop.

status.comment: Implemented frontend auto-resume for previously connected watchdog sessions, restored session-owned animator state on reconnect, and added Claude terminal hydration to match Codex/Gemini. Frontend type-check/build and session builds pass, but end-to-end browser reload verification still needs a normal local machine because the sandbox cannot run the live stack.
